languages.original_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

languages.text: "Я возьму на себя интерпретацию его слов, но заранее прошу простить за то, что не смогу сравняться по элегантности слога с дражайшим коллегой".
"I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."
languages.original_text: "Я возьму на себя интерпретацию его слов, но заранее прошу простить за то, что не смогу сравняться по элегантности слога с дражайшим коллегой".

traits.locale_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."
"I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."
"I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

languages.text: «Me encargaré de interpretar sus palabras, pero ruego sus disculpas de antemano por no estar a la altura de la elegancia retórica de mi querido colega».
languages.original_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

traits.locale_text: «Me encargaré de interpretar sus palabras, pero ruego sus disculpas de antemano por no estar a la altura de la elegancia retórica de mi querido colega».

languages.text: “我会替他转述，但若论言辞之优雅，我肯定远不及我最亲爱的同僚，还请先行见谅。”
languages.original_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

traits.locale_text: “我会替他转述，但若论言辞之优雅，我肯定远不及我最亲爱的同僚，还请先行见谅。”

languages.text: « Permettez-moi d'interpréter ses paroles, mais je vous présente mes excuses par avance si je n'ai pas la même élégance rhétorique que mon cher collègue. »
languages.original_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

traits.locale_text: « Permettez-moi d'interpréter ses paroles, mais je vous présente mes excuses par avance si je n'ai pas la même élégance rhétorique que mon cher collègue. »

languages.text: "Ich nehme es auf mich, seine Worte zu interpretieren, aber ich bitte zu entschuldigen, dass es mir an der rhetorischen Eleganz meines geschätzten Kollegen fehlt."
languages.original_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

traits.locale_text: "Ich nehme es auf mich, seine Worte zu interpretieren, aber ich bitte zu entschuldigen, dass es mir an der rhetorischen Eleganz meines geschätzten Kollegen fehlt."

languages.text: 「彼の言葉を解釈するのは私の役目だが、修辞的なエレガンスという点では、私の親愛なる同僚には遠く及ばないことをあらかじめお許し願いたい」。
languages.original_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

languages.text: "Sözlerini yorumlamayı üstleneceğim ama retorik zarafeti açısından pek değerli meslektaşımın çok gerisinde kaldığım için şimdiden affınızı diliyorum."
languages.original_text: "I will take it upon myself to interpret his words, but I beg your pardon in advance for falling far short of my dearest colleague in terms of rhetorical elegance."

traits.locale_text: "Sözlerini yorumlamayı üstleneceğim ama retorik zarafeti açısından pek değerli meslektaşımın çok gerisinde kaldığım için şimdiden affınızı diliyorum."
